description: Assemble three Mobile Broadcast Kits by checking out peripheral components to parent Sony FX6 camera bodies and then assigning the cameras to field producers. Kit 1 consists of CAM-001 with LENS-001, MIC-001, and BAT-001 checked out to the camera asset. Kit 2 consists of CAM-002 with LENS-002, MIC-002, and BAT-002 checked out to the camera asset. Kit 3 consists of CAM-003 with LENS-003, MIC-004 (do not use MIC-003), and BAT-003 checked out to the camera asset. Assign CAM-001 to Elena Rostova, CAM-002 to Marcus Johnson, and CAM-003 to Sarah Chen. All camera checkouts to users must include the note 'Q3 field work'.
